title: phyllanthus pachyphyllus
intro: Phyllanthus pachyphyllus, also known as the Malayan spurge or Pachyphyllus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus pachyphyllus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Phyllanthus pachyphyllus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusion, making it a versatile and widely used medicinal plant.
